extensionDescription.message: Open source audio guard for streamers. Smooths web volume locally, with no trackers and no data collection.
extensionDescription.description: Short description displayed by the browser and extension stores.

helpNormalization.message: Turns StreamVolume Guard processing on or off for the active tab.

helpProfile.message: Chooses the loudness behavior: softer, normal, streamer-safe or night listening.

helpStreamStatus.message: Shows whether recent audio looks safe, close to the limit, or risky for a stream.

helpContainedPeaks.message: Counts likely loud peaks that the safety limiter caught on this tab.

helpGain.message: Current automatic volume change applied to the detected media.

helpRms.message: Approximate average loudness level measured from the media signal.

helpMedia.message: Detected media count compared with media currently routed through the audio pipeline.

helpDiagnostics.message: Quick technical checks for streamers: media detection, active pipeline and blocked sources.

helpActivateTab.message: Injects the extension into the current tab and starts processing detected media.

helpAutoDomain.message: Requests permission to automatically activate StreamVolume Guard on this domain.

helpOptions.message: Opens advanced local settings such as target level, boost, limiter and domain lists.

helpOptionsProfile.message: Default profile used when processing web audio.

helpTargetRms.message: Target average loudness in dB. Higher values sound louder, lower values are calmer.

helpMaxBoost.message: Maximum gain allowed when content is too quiet, to avoid noise and pumping.

helpMaxReduction.message: Maximum gain reduction allowed when content is too loud.

helpEnabled.message: Global switch saved locally. It controls whether normalization is allowed.

helpCompressor.message: Soft compressor that tames loud changes before they hit the limiter.

helpLimiter.message: Safety limiter that catches peaks near the output ceiling to reduce clipping risk.

helpAutoDomains.message: Domains where the extension can activate automatically after permission is granted.

helpExcludedDomains.message: Domains where StreamVolume Guard must stay bypassed.

helpCapabilities.message: Shows which free or advanced capabilities are available in this build.

warningTargetHot.message: Target level is hot; streams may feel louder than expected.

warningBoostHigh.message: Max boost is above +12 dB and may raise noise or pumping.

warningCompressorOff.message: Soft compressor is off; volume jumps can feel more abrupt.

warningLimiterOff.message: Safety limiter is off; sudden peaks can clip or surprise viewers.

warningExcludedDomains.message: Some domains are excluded and will bypass protection.

optionsTargetDescription.message: Target average level: higher sounds louder, lower sounds calmer.

optionsBoostDescription.message: Limits how much quiet content can be raised.

optionsReductionDescription.message: Limits how much loud content can be reduced.

optionsAutoDomainsDescription.message: One domain per line to activate the extension without using the popup again.

optionsExcludedDomainsDescription.message: Domains that should never be processed, even when the extension is active.

optionsCapabilitiesDescription.message: Summarizes what is active in this version and what is planned for later.

optionsDiagnosticsDescription.message: Generates a local JSON file that testers can manually attach to a bug report.

optionsObsCalibrationDescription.message: Play these sounds in the browser, capture the browser in OBS, then adjust your mix so loud moments keep headroom before red.

optionsObsCalibrationNote.message: Recommendation: start with the OBS profile, then check that loud sounds stay controlled in the OBS meter.

platformProfilesDescription.message: Check which profile is applied to frequent platforms and remove local custom settings when needed.

targetVolumeDescription.message: Adjust the extension's average target with a quick local listening preview.

targetVolumePreviewNote.message: Local sound generated by the browser to set the average volume before a live stream.

optionsApplySavedNoTab.message: settings saved, no processed tab open
